title: Living docs sweep + self-onboard this repo + full green close
action: Per D4: sweep ALL living doc surfaces still teaching shim invocations — docs/specs/*.md (workflow-state 6, feedback-digest 1, reading-map 1), docs/0*-*.md (01:1, 02:15, 03:6, 04:2, 05:3, 06:9, 07:8, 08:1, 09:1), docs/config-reference.md (2), docs/model-presets.md (1) — to the bee.mjs form; leave docs/history/**, docs/decisions/**, docs/backlog.md rows untouched (records). Cleanup: remove dead declarations left by the cell-1 parity deletion — skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs writeCell (~57) and collectFeedback (~125) if truly unreferenced; check templates/lib/backlog.mjs headerLine (~104) and remove only if dead. Then self-onboard this repo: node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --json (review plan: expect remove_helper x9 for .bee/bin shims + copy_helper for changed bee.mjs/templates + agents block update), then --apply, confirming recheck reads up_to_date and .bee/bin has no bee_*.mjs. Note: hook-test assertion flips already happened in cell 3 (vendor lib was synced in cell 1) — your verify just re-runs both hook suites to prove they stay green after the self-onboard. Finish with the full baseline verify.

truths: no living doc teaches a shim invocation as current behavior
.bee/bin/ of this repo contains bee.mjs but no bee_*.mjs
onboarding recheck is up_to_date after apply
hook test suites green against the freshly vendored lib
artifacts: onboard apply output in done report
prohibitions: never hand-delete .bee/bin files — the onboarding apply does the removal (it proves D2 works end-to-end)

verify: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs && node hooks/test_write_guard.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && [ -z "$(ls .bee/bin/bee_*.mjs 2>/dev/null)" ] && [ -z "$(grep -rlE 'bee_(status|cells|reservations|decisions|state|backlog|capture|reviews|feedback)\.mjs' docs/specs docs/0*-*.md docs/config-reference.md docs/model-presets.md 2>/dev/null)" ]

trace.outcome: Living-doc shim sweep (docs/specs + docs/0*.md + config-reference + model-presets) rewritten to bee.mjs <group> <verb> form; 2 dead-code declarations removed (test_lib.mjs writeCell/collectFeedback unused imports, backlog.mjs headerLine write-only local); self-onboarded this repo with --apply, D2's RETIRED_HELPERS pass deleted all 9 bee_*.mjs shims from .bee/bin (recheck: up_to_date, empty plan); full baseline verify green (test_lib 292/0, test_onboard_bee PASS, hook suites ALL PASS).
